localized title: Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates
plot outline: Hard-partying brothers Mike (Adam Devine) and Dave (Zac Efron) place an online ad to find the perfect dates (Anna Kendrick, Aubrey Plaza) for their sister's Hawaiian wedding. Hoping for a wild getaway, the boys instead find themselves outsmarted and out-partied by the uncontrollable duo.
title: Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates
original title: Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates
akas: Mike & Dave Need Wedding Dates (World-wide, English title)
Mike y Dave buscan rollo serio (Spain)
